creator: dereckson@espace-win.org
text:
Changes description:

* Port updated to 0.1.41
* GUI is now enabled by default in upstream configure file
* Adding NLS knob for gettext
* Tidying pkg-plist

Change revision: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D1230

Test result: https://reviews.freebsd.org/P37

Naddy, do you have an opinion about the gettext handling?
